root_causes: Elevated CO levels not acted upon
Simultaneous maintenance and confined space entry
Permit-to-work not checked against gas readings
warning_signs_missed: CO sensor reading 35ppm for 2 hours before incident
Ventilation inspection overdue by 3 days
prevention_measures: Automated gas-monitoring linked to permit system
Mandatory cross-check of sensor data before permit approval
description: Explosion during maintenance in coke oven battery area due to accumulated CO gas.

root_causes: Workers too close to tap hole
warning_signs_missed: Vibration sensor showed 6.2mm/s for 48 hours
Refractory thickness inspection overdue by 2 weeks
description: Hot metal splash from blast furnace tap hole due to refractory lining failure.

warning_signs_missed: Gas detector non-functional for 72 hours
Maintenance schedule missed
No stand-by gas detector deployed
description: CO gas leak from processing unit valve. Three workers died due to prolonged exposure before detection.

warning_signs_missed: CH4 sensor reading 12%LEL 30 min before incident
Hot work permit not cross-checked with gas readings
prevention_measures: Mandatory gas testing before hot work
description: Fire broke out during welding near gas pipeline.

warning_signs_missed: Electrical permit not closed from previous shift
No second-person verification
prevention_measures: Mandatory verification step in electrical permits
description: Electrician received fatal shock while working on panel that was not properly isolated.

warning_signs_missed: Scaffold inspection tag expired 5 days prior
Weather advisory for high winds ignored
description: Worker fell from scaffold during blast furnace maintenance.

warning_signs_missed: O2 level at 17.2% recorded 1 hour before entry
Confined space permit approved without gas test results
prevention_measures: Mandatory real-time gas monitoring during confined space work
Automated permit approval with sensor validation
description: Two workers asphyxiated in gas processing vessel.

warning_signs_missed: Cracks reported in inspection log 2 weeks prior
Rain accumulation not addressed
description: Storage area wall collapsed after heavy rain.

warning_signs_missed: Pipe thickness below minimum reported 3 months earlier
Vibration readings elevated for 2 weeks
prevention_measures: Automated exclusion zones around critical equipment
description: Steam line ruptured during operation causing severe burns.

root_causes: Wind direction change pushed gas into work area
warning_signs_missed: Fixed CO detector showed 28ppm for 1 hour before escalation
Weather station showed wind shift
prevention_measures: Mandatory portable detectors for all furnace area workers
description: CO gas from blast furnace shell leak poisoned workers.

warning_signs_missed: Crane load test overdue by 6 months
Maintenance log showed hydraulic pressure anomaly
description: Worker crushed when overloaded crane failed during material handling.

warning_signs_missed: Inclinometer showed 2mm/day movement for 2 weeks
Rain gauge showed above-threshold precipitation
prevention_measures: Blasting exclusion zones based on slope data
description: Landslide at ore storage area after blasting.

warning_signs_missed: CH4 detector showed 15%LEL 2 hours before incident
Ventilation system shut down for maintenance without alternate arrangement
prevention_measures: Continuous gas monitoring with automated ventilation
description: Gas explosion in processing unit.

warning_signs_missed: Air quality monitor showed elevated VOC for 4 hours
Workers reported unusual odor but were told to continue
prevention_measures: Automated VOC monitoring with evacuation triggers
description: Mass benzene exposure at coke oven.

warning_signs_missed: Temperature in electrical room elevated for 1 week
Dust cleaning schedule missed for 3 months
description: Electrical fire in control room PLC panel.

warning_signs_missed: Cooling water temperature differential decreased over 2 weeks
Thermal imaging inspection not performed as scheduled
prevention_measures: Continuous thermal imaging of furnace shell
description: Hot metal breakout from blast furnace hearth.

warning_signs_missed: Guard removal not logged in maintenance system
LOTO procedure bypassed
description: Workers injured when conveyor started unexpectedly during maintenance.

warning_signs_missed: Pressure gauge showing gradual increase over 3 days
Corrosion inspection of insulated piping never performed
description: Gas pipeline ruptured due to corrosion under insulation.

warning_signs_missed: Dust monitoring system showed >4mg/m³ for 5 days
Housekeeping audit findings not addressed for 2 weeks
description: Coal dust explosion in storage area.

warning_signs_missed: Chemical storage inspection found expired PPE 1 week prior
Spill containment system test overdue
description: Workers received chemical burns from ammonium sulfate spill.
